cards.back: A set of instructions or a program that tells a computer what to do.
Web applications involve user interaction, data exchange, and dynamic updates, which differentiate them from traditional desktop applications.
The application of engineering principles and techniques to the design, development, testing, and maintenance of software systems.
A systematic approach to software development that involves planning, designing, coding, testing, and delivering software products.
A professional who designs, develops, tests, and maintains software systems, applying technical skills and engineering principles to meet business needs.
